title: solenostemon ocymoides var. monostachyus
intro: Solenostemon ocymoides var. monostachyus, also known as Coleus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its distinctive purple or blue flowers and attractive foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solenostemon ocymoides var. monostachyus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
